sections.title: Using any item on Patty, including chef's hat

lines.speaker: Patty Seer
lines.text: Oh... thank you for the offer but I'm not interested in that.

lines.speaker: Patty Seer
lines.text: Oh no... what do I do?

lines.speaker: Patty Seer
lines.text: It's all gone wrong...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Patty Seer
lines.text: I'm supposed to be cooking a cake for the Cake Off but my prized tin has broken!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the Cake Off?

lines.speaker: Patty Seer
lines.text: Oh, you don't know about the Great Gielinor Cake Off? It's Party Pete's newest idea!

lines.speaker: Patty Seer
lines.text: He's invited representatives from across the world to have their baking skills judged.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Patty Seer
lines.text: Oh! I'm Patty Seer, a wandering cook! I'm traveling the world learning everything I can about food.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your prized tin?

lines.speaker: Patty Seer
lines.text: Yes, I use it for every cake I bake. It brings me luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's happened to it?

lines.speaker: Patty Seer
lines.text: I'm not sure how, but it's broken in two... Do you think you might be able to help me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure I can find someone to fix it!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: What about Bob?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think he can fix it?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Yes, I'd imagine he can! Not to mention, he owes me one!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Take this to him, it should cover the cost of the repair. You should be able to find him in his shop to the south.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't help you right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't help you right now.
